title: Citroen DS3 Cabrio 1.2 VTi So Chic 2014 | 1-TZD-77
remarks:
Please note!
For Dutch buyers and buyers from outside the EU, the Rest-BPM is on top of the bid amount. The Rest BPM is € 298 and is not included in the total price when bidding. The total price does not include BPM. This scheme only applies to buyers within the Netherlands and buyers outside the EU.
For buyers within the EU, an advance equal to the BPM is requested. The Rest BPM will be refunded to the buyer by bank after the correct registration of the vehicle in the country of residence within the EU.
For further information about BPM, please consult the auction information, which can be found at the top of the homepage of our website.
If you have any questions about the BPM scheme, please contact our customer service and/or the tax authorities.

title: Citroen DS23 Pallas - 1973
remarks:
Beautiful 1973 Citroen DS23 Pallas equipped with Bosch electronic fuel injection. 

Starts and rides perfectly. 

Luxembourg vehicle in exceptional condition for its age with an expert report classifying it as a historic vehicle (downloadable in pdf).  

Options: 
- Hydropneumatic suspension with levelling
- Hydraulic power steering
- Leather upholstery with heated front seats
- Swivel headlights 
- Air conditioning 
- Fog lamps 
- 5-speed semi-automatic transmission
- Car radio

IMPORTANT INFORMATION: Descriptions, equipment lists, and photographs are provided for informational purposes only and have no contractual value. Despite the care taken in their drafting, errors or omissions may remain. If an item, option or equipment is decisive for your purchase decision, it is recommended that you check this before bidding. Detailed information about the vehicles, current sales and practical details can be found on the official website:https://carduc-auctions.lu.
For questions before a sale closes: sales@carduc-auctions.lu. 
Tel: +352 621 595 373
additional_information:
Used vehicle offered for auction by Carduc Auctions, an auction house based in Luxembourg. 

Like any used vehicle, it may show normal signs of wear and tear related to its age, mileage and previous use, both aesthetically and mechanically. 

The information contained in this announcement is communicated in good faith, based on the information available. Carduc Auctions does not carry out a thorough technical inspection of vehicles. 

The information is provided for information purposes only in order to allow bidders to make as complete an assessment as possible. 

The vehicles are located in Luxembourg and can be consulted by appointment, in person or via videoconference, according to the terms and conditions indicated for the sale. 

Detailed information about the vehicles, current sales and practical details is available on the official website: https://carduc-auctions.lu

For questions before an auction closes: sales@carduc-auctions.lu Tel: +352 621 595 373. We can also be reached on Whatsapp.
